sections.paragraph:
Original: אכל

Transliteration: 'ăkal

Phonetic: ak-al'

BDB Definition:

  1. to eat, devour
    1. (Peal)
      1. to eat (of beasts)
      2. to devour
      3. eat their pieces (in a phrase, that is, slander them)

Origin: corresponding to H398

TWOT entry: 2573

Part(s) of speech: Verb
